title: Hardware capacity headroom escalation
scenario: A service currently sustains 90,000 requests per minute. Forecast demand is 120,000 requests per minute, and each additional replica adds 15,000 requests per minute. Leadership requires at least 20% headroom for burst traffic and wants a plan that covers scaling lag risks.
constraints: Account for headroom, not only nominal demand.
Include operational risks during rapid spikes.
required_facts: Headroom target changes required replica count.
Autoscaling lag can violate SLOs during bursts.
Recommendation must include monitoring and rollback triggers.
